name: room with a low ceiling
description: I'm in a room with a low ceiling
items_start: Strange knobs on wall: Yellow, Green, Blue
hints: Three colored knobs on the wall - each does something different. The skeleton is a warning!
Try pulling each knob. They transport you to different rooms via a revolving wall.
PULL BLUE goes to room 23 (fortune telling). PULL YELL goes to room 24 (music). PULL GREE goes to room 8 (trampoline).
PULL GREE is safe and useful - takes you to the trampoline room. PULL YELL leads toward the maze. PULL BLUE leads to the fortune teller.

effects: Message: Wall swings me around & I'm elsewhere...
Message: Wall swings me around & I'm elsewhere...
Message: Wall swings me around & I'm elsewhere...

notes: Key puzzle room with three colored knobs. Each knob transports you to a different area. Blue=fortune teller (23), Yellow=music room (24), Green=trampoline room (8). The skeleton warns of danger. W=beside tank (room 4).
